improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try three free searches today."><meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Meet Gideon, Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access for business owners and traders. Start with three free searches."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:url" content="https://gdn.ai"><meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-image.jpg"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image"><meta name="twitter:title" content="GDN AI – Meet Gideon, Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta name="twitter:description" content="Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business professionals. Try three free searches.">
improvements.rationale: Search engines display meta descriptions in results, directly influencing click-through rates. Open Graph and Twitter Card tags ensure professional, branded previews when the link is shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, or Twitter—critical channels for reaching business professionals. The copy highlights the free trial offer and core value props without inventing claims, encouraging clicks and shares.

improvements.suggestion:
Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant

Meet Gideon — instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for business owners and traders. Try three free searches, no credit card required.
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately communicates what Gideon is (AI assistant for trade/business), while the subheading highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, professional support) and removes friction with the free trial callout. The copy is concise, speaks directly to the target audience, and creates a clear path to action.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to choose a membership plan to continue. Plans start from just US$2 per day, billed monthly or annually—with annual billing saving you 30 percent. As a member, you'll unlock unlimited access to Gideon's AI-powered trade and business support, voice chat, and your own dedicated workspace.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point—the paywall visitors encounter after the free trial. By clearly explaining what happens next and reinforcing the low entry price and value (unlimited access, voice chat, workspace), it reduces uncertainty and positions the upgrade as a logical next step rather than a barrier.
